title: chore: delete deepl-setup branch
description: After all changes are merged to master, delete the deepl-setup branch with git branch -d deepl-setup.

title: feat: add mise config and regenerate Brewfile
description: New mise/config.toml and mise/setup.sh for mise global tool config. Update bootstrap.sh to add mise/setup.sh step. Regenerate brew/Brewfile via brew bundle dump --force then curate: remove tools now managed by mise, stale taps, dependency-only packages, user exclusions.

title: feat: update tmux, ghostty, and macos
description: tmux/.tmux.conf: use UK layout prefix (backtick) as default, German commented out. ghostty/config: use working-tree version (opacity 0.97, quick terminal keybind, shift+enter). macos/setup.sh: keep set -x addition.

title: fix(git): make gitconfig portable with includeIf
description: Replace hardcoded /Users/stephan/ with ~, remove [user] block (now via includeIf), remove obsolete [filter hawser]. Add .claude to .gitignore_global. Add create_gitconfig_if_missing() helper to git/setup.sh that creates per-dir gitconfigs with identity.

title: feat(zsh): make zshrc portable with .local override
description: Full rewrite of zsh/.zshrc (181 -> ~80 lines). Remove commented-out boilerplate, stale plugins, obsolete exports. Replace hardcoded paths with ~/. Add .zshrc.local sourcing. Resolve completions dynamically via command -v.

title: feat(zsh): clean up starship and completions
description: Use cleaned-up starship.toml from deepl-setup. Delete zsh/.zsh_completions entirely. Update zsh/setup.sh to remove .zsh_completions symlink, generate only _talosctl, clean up stale manual copies (_helm, _kubectl, _mise).
